title: ASR Outdoor 36-Inch Easy to Store Collapsible Foam Grip Snow Shovel
description:
We are proud to present our ASR Outdoor 36-Inch Collapsible Foam Grip Snow Shovel. You can take this shovel apart for easy storage, or keep it together to have it ready whenever you need it. Our shovel is a great tool when it's snowing, for clearing paths, gardening, camping, or performing a variety of outdoor tasks. To Assemble: (1) Insert the shaft end and align the release button to the blades socket (2) Unlock the collar and pull the handle until your desired length, and re-lock the collar

ASR Outdoor 36-Inch Easy to Store Collapsible Foam Grip Snow Shovel

We are proud to present our ASR Outdoor 36-Inch Collapsible Foam Grip Snow Shovel. You can take this shovel apart for easy storage, or keep it together to have it ready whenever you need it. Our shovel is a great tool when it's snowing, for clearing paths, gardening, camping, or performing a variety of outdoor tasks.

Key Features

  • LENGTH - 36" when assembled and fully extended
  • HANDLE - 4" Width and foam grip length of 5"
  • BLADE - Dimensions 9-1/2" x 12-3/4" x 2-1/2"
  • MATERIAL - Plastic blade with an iron handle for durability
  • USES - shoveling snow, clearing paths, gardening, camping, and other outdoor activities

Product Specifications

  • MPN: CSSHR
  • UPC: 060886308997
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 36 in

To Assemble: (1) Insert the shaft end and align the release button to the blades socket (2) Unlock the collar and pull the handle until your desired length, and re-lock the collar
